Use the Pandas and Numpy libraries to analyze the rental market for properties in a particular city in the US. Mean, median, and standard deviation of rental prices, and also identify outliers. Segment your analysis based on property types (like single family homes, condos, etc.). Create a visualization using Matplotlib or Seaborn library to represent your findings. * * *
